title: Issue #92 GitLab provider adoption polish
description: Consume issue #92 Issue Fix Request via Roadmap-Sliced Development; remove first-time GitLab validation friction and tighten provider-specific artifacts.

decisions.answer: Fix first-time GitLab adoption friction discovered by #92 dogfood validation, without broadening route consumers beyond the current GitHub-baseline parity target.
decisions.note: Acceptance is replayable GitLab artifacts, provider-specific wording, and validation-friendly generated bundle behavior.

decisions.answer: Use codex/issue-92-gitlab-provider-adoption-polish because local sandbox/ref constraints prevented creating zjal/issue-92-gitlab-provider-adoption-polish.
decisions.note: The roadmap still follows the Roadmap-Sliced lifecycle and records the branch anchor explicitly.

1-1-1.label: Consume #92 Issue Fix Request and record branch anchors
1-1-1.notes: Commit intent: initialize Roadmap-Sliced process state for #92 consumption. Evidence: branch codex/issue-92-gitlab-provider-adoption-polish created; source issue #92 contains Issue Fix Request ifr_triage_798811d9a6aa and start comment; process roadmap initialized at docs/plans/issue-92-gitlab-provider-adoption-polish-roadmap.json with markdown view; consumed lifecycle comment appended at https://github.com/jununfly/ZAgenticLoop/issues/92#issuecomment-4935927474. Verification: roadmap validate; git diff --check.

1-2-1.label: Make GitLab init expose validation-friendly package and runner options
1-2-1.notes: Commit intent: make GitLab generated CI bundle validation-friendly without manual search/replace. Implemented --gitlab-core-package for zj-loop-init --add/--upgrade gitlab-ci; GitLab templates render __ZJ_LOOP_CORE_PACKAGE__ into npx --package calls while default remains @jununfly/zj-loop-core@0.1.4; tests cover default pin, local tarball override, and upgrade output. Verification: npm test in tools/zj-loop-init.

1-2-2.label: Keep GitLab diagnostic artifacts observable when plans are blocked
1-2-2.notes: Commit intent: keep GitLab dry-run/request-only diagnostic artifacts observable when consumer plans are blocked or refused. Implemented GitLab templates so consumer-plan commands write JSON and continue with || true; downstream cat/artifact steps still fail if JSON is missing. Tests assert all generated GitLab fragments preserve consumer-plan.json observability. Verification: npm test in tools/zj-loop-init.

1-3-1.label: Remove GitHub-specific wording from GitLab provider outputs
1-3-1.notes: Commit intent: remove GitHub-specific wording from GitLab post-merge closeout output. Implemented provider-aware review labels and confirmation locations in post-merge closeout plans/comments; GitLab dry-run evidence now says MR/manual pipeline/ZJ_LOOP_LIVE_CLEANUP_CONFIRMATION and avoids workflow_dispatch/GitHub Actions/PR # wording. Verification: npm test in tools/zj-loop-core.

1-3-2.label: Generate CI Sweeper dry-run Issue Fix Request artifacts for GitLab

1-4-1.label: Update user-facing docs and durable architecture notes

1-4-2.label: Close process roadmap and prepare PR handoff
